overall.description: A cinematic slow orbit around a dragon fountain in a medieval castle courtyard at night, from a video game. The camera circles the central statue revealing Gothic architecture, multiple stone staircases, and warm lantern light against a cool night sky.

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting the central fountain to survey the Gothic architecture and staircases

entered.detail: ornate stone fountain with coiled dragon sculpture and surrounding reeds
sweeping stone staircase with balustrades ascending along the right wall
tall stone walls with multiple illuminated Gothic windows rising above the courtyard
warm glowing lanterns mounted on stone walls providing ambient illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit castle courtyard centered on a dragon fountain. The camera begins a slow counter-clockwise orbit, revealing a curved grand staircase on the right and towering Gothic walls with lit windows. The space is empty and quiet, with warm lantern light contrasting against cool stone.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard side with sky view

events.description: night sky with clouds becomes visible as camera moves past the building facade, shifting from enclosed to open atmosphere

agents.ego_description: continuing the circular path around the fountain, revealing the open sky and opposite staircase

entered.detail: dark blue night sky with scattered clouds visible between buildings
straight stone staircase with railings ascending to upper levels on the left side

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues orbiting the fountain, the night sky becomes visible, transitioning the lighting from warm artificial to mixed natural and artificial. The straight grand staircase emerges on the left while the curved staircase recedes to the background. The dragon statue now dominates the right side of the frame.

agents.ego_description: completing the arc around the fountain and approaching the left grand staircase

segments.scene_description: The final segment brings the camera toward the straight grand staircase on the left, with the fountain now receding to the right background. The curved staircase and sky exit the frame as the camera moves into a more enclosed position against the left wall, ending with a view up the stone steps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous counter-clockwise orbit around a central dragon fountain, transitioning from an open view of the moonlit courtyard to a focused perspective against a castle wall. It begins by circling the fountain to reveal a curved grand staircase and towering Gothic walls illuminated by warm lantern light against cool stone. As the camera continues its rotation, the night sky opens up above, shifting the lighting to a mix of natural and artificial tones while the dragon statue moves to the right and a straight staircase emerges on the left. The scene then shifts focus toward this straight staircase as the fountain and curved stairs recede into the background. Finally, the camera moves into a more enclosed position against the left wall, ending with a direct view looking up the stone steps.
